title: graph_nodes at capture + opt-in recall token budget (still true in v2.2.0)
summary: Capture links packets to code graph nodes at write time graph nodes ; recall token budget stays opt in/bounded. Still true through v2.2.0; layered on top without changing the decision: recall appends a Personal Memory se
body: Capture links packets to code-graph nodes at write time (graph_nodes); recall token budget stays opt-in/bounded. Still true through v2.2.0; layered on top without changing the decision: recall appends a Personal Memory section (trimmed FIRST over budget, ranks last) and kage resume carries a separate ~800-token timeline cap. Receipts use max(read-vs-source, replay discovery_tokens math).

context.fact: recall appends a Personal Memory section (trimmed FIRST over budget, ranks last) and kage resume carries a separate ~800-token timeline cap. Receipts use max(read-vs-source, replay discovery_tokens math).
